languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn breaks off, looking at Nuncius:{/n} "My dearest colleague suggests that my answer is becoming tiresome. If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн смотрит на Нунциуса и прерывается.{/n} "Дражайший коллега намекает, что мой ответ становится утомительным. Если вам будет любопытно, я готов попытаться составить трактат о своем устройстве, но более сложной задачей будет придать ему удобоваримую для мирян{mf|ина|ки} форму..."

{n}Eogunn breaks off, looking at Nuncius:{/n} "My dearest colleague suggests that my answer is becoming tiresome. If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн смотрит на Нунциуса и прерывается.{/n} "Дражайший коллега намекает, что мой ответ становится утомительным. Если вам будет любопытно, я готов попытаться составить трактат о своем устройстве, но более сложной задачей будет придать ему удобоваримую для мирян{mf|ина|ки} форму..."

If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."

{n}Eogunn breaks off, looking at Nuncius:{/n} "My dearest colleague suggests that my answer is becoming tiresome. If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."

{n}Eogunn breaks off, looking at Nuncius:{/n} "My dearest colleague suggests that my answer is becoming tiresome. If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se interrumpe y mira a Nuncius:{/n} «Mi querido colega sugiere que mi respuesta se puede estar volviendo agotadora. Si tiene curiosidad, me encantaría componer un tratado sobre mis teorías, pero lo difícil será darle una forma comprensible para un{mf||a} laic{mf|o|a}...».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn breaks off, looking at Nuncius:{/n} "My dearest colleague suggests that my answer is becoming tiresome. If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn se interrumpe y mira a Nuncius:{/n} «Mi querido colega sugiere que mi respuesta se puede estar volviendo agotadora. Si tiene curiosidad, me encantaría componer un tratado sobre mis teorías, pero lo difícil será darle una forma comprensible para un{mf||a} laic{mf|o|a}...».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡停住话头，看向努恩修斯：{/n}“我最亲爱的同僚说，我的回答开始变得乏味了。如果您有兴趣，我可以试着写一篇关于自身构造的论文，不过更难办的是，怎么写得通俗易懂，让教外人士能看明白……”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn breaks off, looking at Nuncius:{/n} "My dearest colleague suggests that my answer is becoming tiresome. If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡停住话头，看向努恩修斯：{/n}“我最亲爱的同僚说，我的回答开始变得乏味了。如果您有兴趣，我可以试着写一篇关于自身构造的论文，不过更难办的是，怎么写得通俗易懂，让教外人士能看明白……”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn s'interrompt et lance un regard à Nuncius.{/n} « Mon cher collègue me fait remarquer que ma réponse est un peu longue. Si elle a éveillé votre curiosité, je me ferai un plaisir de tenter de rédiger un traité sur ma construction, même si le plus difficile sera sans doute de le rendre accessible à {mf|un|une} profane... »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn breaks off, looking at Nuncius:{/n} "My dearest colleague suggests that my answer is becoming tiresome. If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn s'interrompt et lance un regard à Nuncius.{/n} « Mon cher collègue me fait remarquer que ma réponse est un peu longue. Si elle a éveillé votre curiosité, je me ferai un plaisir de tenter de rédiger un traité sur ma construction, même si le plus difficile sera sans doute de le rendre accessible à {mf|un|une} profane... »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn verstummt und betrachtet Nuncius:{/n} "Mein geschätzter Kollege empfindet meine Antwort als ermüdend. Falls es Euch interessiert, verfasse ich gerne ein Traktat zu meiner Konstruktion, aber es dürfte schwierig werden, es für {mf|einen Laien|eine Laiin} verständlich zu halten ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn breaks off, looking at Nuncius:{/n} "My dearest colleague suggests that my answer is becoming tiresome. If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn verstummt und betrachtet Nuncius:{/n} "Mein geschätzter Kollege empfindet meine Antwort als ermüdend. Falls es Euch interessiert, verfasse ich gerne ein Traktat zu meiner Konstruktion, aber es dürfte schwierig werden, es für {mf|einen Laien|eine Laiin} verständlich zu halten ..."

languages.text: {n}エオグンが言葉を切り、ヌンシウスを見た：{/n}「私の親愛なる同僚は、私の答えが退屈になってきていると言っている。もしご興味がおありでしたら、喜んで私の構造に関する論文を書かせていただきますが、それよりも難しいのは、素人にも理解できるような形にすることでしょう......」。
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn breaks off, looking at Nuncius:{/n} "My dearest colleague suggests that my answer is becoming tiresome. If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn aniden durup Nuncius'a bakıyor.{/n} "Pek değerli meslektaşım, cevabımın sıkıcı olduğunu öne sürüyor. Merak ediyorsanız yapıma dair bir tez hazırlamaktan memnuniyet duyarım ancak asıl zorluk, ona avamdan birinin anlayabileceği bir biçim vermek olacaktır..."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn breaks off, looking at Nuncius:{/n} "My dearest colleague suggests that my answer is becoming tiresome. If you are curious, I would be pleased to attempt to compose a treatise on my construction, but the more difficult task will be to give it a form comprehensible to a layperson..."
